title: Intervention points concepts - Microsoft Foundry
description: Learn about Agentic AI intervention points.
summary: Agentic AI expands both capability and attack surface. When an agent can call external tools, write to databases, or trigger downstream processes, malfunctions or malicious attacks can steer it off course, leak sensitive data, or execute harmful actions. Guardrails applied only at the model level can leave these vectors exposed. To close this gap, Microsoft Foundry lets you apply guardrails directly to agents and configure individual controls at four different intervention points.
classification_reason: Intervention points article is conceptual about where to apply guardrails in agent workflows, not a detailed configuration or API reference.
